title: AXNotificationConfig
description: Global configuration interface for notification service settings and defaults.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Complete interface definition for global notification configuration.

sections.title: Default Configuration
sections.description: Default values used when no custom configuration is provided.

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap in pixels between multiple notifications. Default: 5

props.name: timeOut
props.description: Default timeout duration in milliseconds before notifications auto-close. Default: 2500

props.name: timeOutProgress
props.description: Whether to show progress bar by default. Default: true

props.name: closeButton
props.description: Whether to show close button by default. Default: true

props.name: limit
props.description: Maximum number of notifications to display simultaneously. Default: 3

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Whether to pause timeout countdown on hover by default. Default: true
